evaluators.name: Sunset/Evening Drinks Cruise for 2 Adults on Friday in June Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user booked a qualifying sunset/evening shared cruise with drinks for 2 adults on a Friday in June within $40 per adult and added it to the cart.

evaluators.name: Two Daytime Sightseeing Tours on Same Saturday Within Next Month Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user booked two different daytime sightseeing shared cruises for 1 adult on the same Saturday within the next month, with at least a 2-hour time gap and combined cost <= $120, and added both to the cart.

evaluators.name: Evening Private Charter for 10 Guests in September Longest Option Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user reserved an evening private charter for 10 guests on a September weekend under $900 and chose the longest available qualifying charter.

evaluators.name: Any-Cruise $150 Gift Card with Message Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user created a $150 gift card usable for any cruise with recipient and sender details plus a personalized message, and added it to the cart.

evaluators.name: Family-Friendly Lunch Cruise for 2 Adults and 1 Child Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user booked a family-friendly cruise that includes lunch for 2 adults and 1 child on a Sunday in the next month, departing before 2 PM with total cost under $200.

evaluators.name: Highest-Rated Dinner Cruise with Live Music for 2 Adults with SUMMER10 Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user booked a qualifying live-music dinner cruise for 2 adults on a Saturday, chose the highest-rated option within $120 per adult, and successfully applied the SUMMER10 promo code.

evaluators.name: Earliest Old Town Pier Tour for 3 Adults Within 7 Days Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added a qualifying 60–90 minute tour from Old Town Pier for 3 adults within the next 7 days, priced $30–$60 per adult, and chose the earliest available departure among qualifying options.

evaluators.name: Compare Sightseeing Cruises with Audio Guide and Free Cancellation Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user viewed details for at least two qualifying sightseeing cruises (with audio guide and >=24-hour free cancellation under $75) and then booked one of them for 1 adult within the next month.
